title: Shield & Parry
description: Adding new elements to combat. Parrying and bashing to give you the edge in all encounters (if youre skilled enough)
body:
# Shield 'n Parry Mod

This mod makes combat require a higher amount of skill while still letting new pvp-ers have a chance. Learn to parry attacks, bash with your shield, and reflect projectiles.

***

## So, What's Actually New?

### 1\. Weapon Parrying

Press **R** (configurable) with a weapon just before an attack hits you.

*   **Perfect timing** blocks damage and staggers the attacker
*   **Weapon matters**: Faster weapons = tighter timing windows, faster cooldown recharge
*   **Feels badass**: Screen effects, sounds, and knockback when you nail it
*   **Fail?** You get slowed down briefly. Practice makes perfect.

![Example of Parrying](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZGQ1b2hueTNmNmt1Z3Q5d3J1NHZyeDQ0ZmlkeXo3NGwxN20xaGg3diZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/8MdBt7YNIsJswhYeQG/giphy.gif)

***

### 2\. Shield Bashing

Hold block with a shield, then press **the parry key**.

*   **Charge forward** and knock enemies back
*   **Applies slowness** to anything you hit
*   **Works with any shield** (vanilla or modded)

![Example of Shield Bashing](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbDNyaHV2YWljcXhnazM0bHpkNWU4bHRwb2dmZWhpZG9udzdkN25iMiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/vNm0DguDlfuRkcG1jQ/giphy.gif)

***

### 3\. Projectile Reflection

Time a parry right as an arrow or fireball reaches you.

*   **Deflects it back** at the shooter
*   **Gains extra power** on the return trip
*   **Works with most modded projectiles** automatically
*   **Extremely satisfying** (and extremely hard) when you reflect a skeleton's own arrows

![Example of Arrow Parrying](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdnNiMzd3MXk3cDdsemVmOHRraGQyOWhnemt3dWJ3cGozbTR4M3NnMSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Gc6cwxeih8JmRmi8W4/giphy.gif)

***

# AND YES YOU CAN PARRY FALL DAMAGE!!!

![Example of Parrying Fall Damage](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZmNzenBwN29hcDd4ZnBldGNuMGE1YTAyOGpocHhta25jN21mejlpOCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/vW1LF1Wj3LGiV0MmH9/giphy.gif)

***

## Extra Stuff & Compatibility

*   **Three new enchantments**:
    *   **Parry Recovery** (less cooldown)
    *   **Parry Window** (easier timing)
    *   **Guarding Lunge** (stronger bashes)
*   **Special compatibility with CombatRoll mod**: Successful parries refill your dodge charges
*   **Fully configurable**: Turn features on/off, blacklist certain attacks
*   **No performance hit**: Efficient code that doesn't lag your game
*   **COMPLETELY INCOMPATIBLE FUNCTIONALLY** with Tactical Shield Overhaul!!!

***

**You are allowed** to use this in modpacks, make videos about it, or add any new compat addons to it.

If you run into bugs or crashes, let me know on Discord: **ashagoob**
